description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with three jobs: test, docs, and benchmarks. The test job runs on a matrix of OS and Python versions, checking out the repository, caching conda packages, setting up Julia and Miniconda, installing the package, running tests with pytest, and uploading test results. The docs job runs on ubuntu-latest, building documentation with Sphinx. The benchmarks job runs on ubuntu-latest, installing asv and running benchmarks. Trigger the workflow on push or pull request to main or vnext branches, as well as on page_build and release created events.
